ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly includes 'Broly' and 'Super Saiyan'; the figure's green aura, massive build, wild upward-erupting hair, and uncontrolled ferocity are the canonical visual signature of the Movie 8 Broly / Legendary Super Saiyan form. The DBS card game officially labeled this card as part of the Broly green archetype in BT1. Confirmed Broly (Dragon Ball Z, Movie 8 / non-canon Legendary Super Saiyan).

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (BT1) launched July 28, 2017 as the inaugural set of the Dragon Ball Super Card Game — 114 cards, 12 per booster pack. The set designers explicitly built the Broly archetype as one of the two main launch decks, leaning into the Legendary Super Saiyan's hand-disruption mechanics as a core green-color identity [PSA Set Registry / WebSearch: PSA article on Galactic Battle].
sources: PSA Set Registry article on Galactic Battle 2017

trivia_bullets.text: The Broly on this card is the non-canonical Movie 8 version — created by screenwriter Takao Koyama and first appearing in Dragon Ball Z: Broly - The Legendary Super Saiyan (1993). This Broly was written outside Akira Toriyama's main continuity for over 25 years before Toriyama produced a canonical reimagining in Dragon Ball Super: Broly (2018). The two Brolys differ substantially in motivation and personality: the 1993 version's Goku fixation stems from adjacent nursery-pod placement; the 2018 version is a more sympathetic, less rage-driven figure [Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Z: Broly – The Legendary Super Saiyan; Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Super: Broly].
sources: Wikipedia: Dragon Ball Z: Broly – The Legendary Super Saiyan

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-075 is a green Common Battle card used as a finishing piece in Broly archetype decks. Per the official Bandai strategy breakdown for Galactic Battle, the Broly green deck's core loop is hand disruption: the Leader Broly forces both players to send a card to the Drop Area on each attack. BT1-075 slots in as the damage closer for that gameplan [Bandai DBS Card Game Strategy: Deck Breakdowns Series 1 - Broly].
sources: Bandai DBS Card Game Strategy: Deck Breakdowns Series1 - Broly

trivia_bullets.text: The green aura and massively upscaled muscular frame are the Legendary Super Saiyan's defining visual contrast to standard Super Saiyan gold — a design choice by Toei that went on to become one of DBZ's most-merchandised transformations despite (or because of) its non-canon status [Wikipedia: Broly].
